_schema.note: Manually-captured builder submissions for ZABAL Gamez. Durable record; the live /submissions board is KV-fed from public activity, so these are the source to promote there (builder posts publicly OR an operator inserts via /api/submission-intake).

projects.name: ZABAL Recording Scout
projects.desc: Turns the ZABAL recording archive into a builder-facing board - pick a lane, find useful sessions, open recordings/transcripts, turn them into July build ideas. Includes a human-reviewed Farcaster Artist Scout concept.

projects.name: Proof Drop
projects.desc: A tool that helps builders prove what they shipped, hashed locally, post-ready. Already the first July build on the site.

projects.name: WaveWarZ Gravity Board
projects.desc: WaveWarZ dashboard UI upgrade / integration - visualizes more than cumulative volume.

projects.name: ZAO music (Droid With A Wallet / ZAO anthem)
projects.desc: Original ZAO/ZABAL songs made with Suno.

projects.name: IDE tutorial video series
projects.desc: Planned submission - setup + walkthrough videos for the top IDEs (Windsurf, Antigravity, VS Code), interactive with quizzes.

projects.name: WaveWarZ Bridge Portal
projects.desc: ETH->SOL on-ramp so Base users can get SOL and join WaveWarZ battles/trading. Base->Solana via Mayan + Wormhole. Mobile-friendly, working testnet + mainnet.

projects.name: Solana MCP
projects.desc: One-click MCP so any agent can connect and interact with the Solana chain.

projects.name: Onklaud 5
projects.desc: Open-source AI fusion model pipeline (Kimi K2.7 + GLM 5.2 + DeepSeek V4 Pro) with cost-saving layers; positioned to match Fable 5 at a fraction of the cost.

projects.name: Chroma Poker
projects.desc: Farcaster poker app - live HUD, multi-site poker tracker, hand-history parsing. Iterating on bugs.

projects.name: Crypto Prediction Orchestrator
projects.desc: 5/15-minute and hourly binary crypto prediction orchestrator connecting 22+ exchanges plus raw on-chain data to surface mispriced contracts / contrarian bets.

projects.name: Predictive apps Space
projects.desc: Hosts Farcaster Spaces on predictive apps and coding for the community.
